name: Lower Back & Hips Stretch
description: Gentle stretch routine targeting the lower back, hips, and glutes. Ideal for desk workers, post-deadlift recovery, or morning stiffness.

exercises.notes: Slow and controlled, sync with breath
Each side — keep opposite leg flat
Each side — sit tall, lean forward over front shin
Each side — pull bottom leg toward chest
Each side — sit tall and lean forward
Widen knees gradually, keep hips in line
Press up gently, keep hips on floor
Each side — keep chest and arms flat
Each side — both shoulders on the ground
Relax completely, breathe into lower back

tips: Breathe deeply into each stretch — exhale to go deeper
Never force through pain, especially in the lower back
Great first thing in the morning or after sitting all day
Can be done daily for cumulative mobility gains
